modal.label: Search
modal.title: Search in {{site}}
modal.hint: Press Ctrl+K or ⌘K to open me. Esc to close. Navigate with arrows or tabs. Enter to go to. e for edit.

empty.title: Find anything.
empty.hint: Pages, content, documents — just start typing ({{min}} chars min).

noResults.title: No results.
noResults.hint: Nothing matched "{{q}}". Try different keywords or check for typos.

content.title: Pages, content and documents in {{site}}, in {{language}}
